listings.title: Listings
listings.subtitle: JIRA for rental search. Press <key>?</key> for help.

emptyState.title: Your hunting journey starts here
emptyState.description: Keep track of all the potential rooms you find. Add a listing to begin comparing and rating them.

emptyColumn.toView: No listings yet. Tap + to add your first listing

filter.title: Filter Listings
filter.multipleHint: Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple areas

delete.title: Delete Listing
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this listing?

detail.title: Listing Details
detail.notFound: Listing not found. It may have been deleted.

evaluation.title: Evaluation
evaluation.noTemplate: No evaluation template found. Create one in Settings first.

map.title: Map
map.noCoordsWarning: {count} listing without map coordinates — edit to add a location
map.noCoordsWarningPlural: {count} listings without map coordinates — edit to add a location

compare.title: Compare
compare.selectListings: Select 2–3 listings from your board to compare them side by side.

schedule.title: Your Schedule
schedule.noViewingsDescription: Any upcoming viewings you schedule will appear here for easy access.

settings.title: Settings
settings.evaluationTemplatesDescription: Criteria used to score and compare listings
settings.agentQuestionsDescription: Question templates to send to property agents
settings.tenantProfileDescription: Your details to share with property agents

help.title: Help & Guide
help.whatIsJIRoomDescription: JIRoom keeps your rental search organised in one place — no more juggling browser tabs, spreadsheet notes, and forgotten links. Track listings from any portal, evaluate them consistently, schedule viewings, compare options side-by-side, and judge locations by commute times to the places that matter.
help.privacy: Everything stays in your browser. No sign-up, no server, no ads.
help.step1: Add a listing: Click "Add listing" on Listings page, paste URL from PropertyGuru/99.co
help.step2: Evaluate: Click listing card, fill evaluation criteria, see score calculate automatically
help.step3: Decide: Set verdict (Yes/Maybe/No) to move to decision columns
help.tip: Tip: Use the sample data (flask icon 🧪) to explore features before adding your own listings.

listingsPage.title: Listings — Your main workspace
listingsPage.columns: Columns: To View (new listings), Yes/Maybe/No (your decisions after viewing)
listingsPage.actions: Actions: Drag cards between columns, click card to evaluate/schedule/notes
listingsPage.tools: Tools: Filter by area/price/score, Sort by price/score/date, Toggle compact view
listingsPage.compare: Compare: Check boxes to select up to 3 listings, then click "Compare"

mapPage.title: Map — Visual location view
mapPage.markers: Markers: All listings shown as pins, color-coded by status or area
mapPage.commute: Commute: Click a listing to see travel times to your anchors
mapPage.addFromMap: Add from map: Search any location → click "Listing" or "Anchor" button
mapPage.filter: Filter: Toggle marker colors, change travel mode (driving/transit/walking/biking)

comparePage.title: Compare — Side-by-side evaluation
comparePage.select: Select up to 3 listings via checkboxes on Listings page
comparePage.view: View key criteria, scores, and verdicts side-by-side

schedulePage.title: Schedule — Your viewing timeline
schedulePage.grouped: Upcoming and past viewings grouped by day
schedulePage.click: Click any entry to see full listing details

settingsDialog.title: Settings Dialog
settingsDialog.access: Access: Settings icon (⚙️) on Listings page toolbar

evaluationTemplates.title: Evaluation Templates
evaluationTemplates.addRemove: Add/remove/reorder criteria by category (Cost, Room, Bathroom, etc.)
evaluationTemplates.types: Criterion types: checkbox, rating 1-5, number with thresholds, select dropdown, text notes
evaluationTemplates.example: Example: Add "Has aircon" as checkbox → +1 if yes, -1 if no

agentQuestions.title: Agent Questions
agentQuestions.create: Create question templates to send property agents
agentQuestions.copy: Copy to clipboard for easy sharing via WhatsApp/email

tenantProfile.title: Tenant Profile
tenantProfile.store: Store your details to share with agents
tenantProfile.fields: Fields: name, occupation, budget, move-in date, lease duration, etc.
tenantProfile.copy: Copy to clipboard for quick sharing

scoring.title: Scoring
scoring.netScore: Net score = total good points - total bad points
scoring.textFields: Text fields and unanswered questions don't affect score

anchors.title: Anchors
anchors.description: Your important locations: home, work, school, MRT stations. Set them once to evaluate commute times for all listings.
anchors.step3: Click the purple "Anchor" button that appears
anchors.step4: Give it a name and type (e.g., "Office" → "work")
anchors.click: Click "Anchors" button (top-right of Map page) to view/edit/delete
anchors.markers: Diamond markers on map show your anchor locations

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.stored: All data stored in your browser (no server, no sign-up)
dataManagement.private: Private and local - nothing leaves your device
dataManagement.export: Export: Download button on Listings page → saves all data as JSON file
dataManagement.import: Import: Upload button → restore from backup or transfer between devices
dataManagement.click: Click flask icon (🧪) on Listings page to load sample data
dataManagement.explore: Explore all features with demo listings
dataManagement.switch: Switch back to your data anytime

keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.toggleHelp: Press ? to toggle this help dialog from any page.
